data.name: 미지의 페이로드를 가진 휠형 휴머노이드 로봇 제어를 향한 실제-시뮬레이션 적응 기반 평형점 추정
From Experts to a Generalist: Toward General Whole-Body Control for Humanoid Robots
BeyondMimic: From Motion Tracking to Versatile Humanoid Control via Guided Diffusion
VR 기반 인간-로봇 협업 시뮬레이션에서 GPT 기반 대형 언어 모델을 활용한 가변 자율성 탐구
인간-로봇 인체공학적 하중 리프팅을 위한 휴머노이드 로봇 설계 최적화
DemoHLM: From One Demonstration to Generalizable Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
From Language to Locomotion: Retargeting-free Humanoid Control via Motion Latent Guidance
Drive-WM: 자율주행을 위한 다중 시각 예측 및 세계 모델 기반 계획

data.description: Exploring a GPT-based Large Language Model for Variable Autonomy in a VR-based Human-Robot Teaming Simulation cites or references Toward Control of Wheeled Humanoid Robots with Unknown Payloads: Equilibrium Point Estimation via Real-to-Sim Adaptation.
Toward Control of Wheeled Humanoid Robots with Unknown Payloads: Equilibrium Point Estimation via Real-to-Sim Adaptation is based on or uses Constraint qualification.
Toward Control of Wheeled Humanoid Robots with Unknown Payloads: Equilibrium Point Estimation via Real-to-Sim Adaptation is based on or uses Active-set method.

Toward Control of Wheeled Humanoid Robots with Unknown Payloads: Equilibrium Point Estimation via Real-to-Sim Adaptation cites or references From Experts to a Generalist: Toward General Whole-Body Control for Humanoid Robots.

Toward Control of Wheeled Humanoid Robots with Unknown Payloads: Equilibrium Point Estimation via Real-to-Sim Adaptation cites or references Drive-WM: Driving into the Future: Multiview Visual Forecasting and Planning with World Model for Autonomous Driving.

Toward Control of Wheeled Humanoid Robots with Unknown Payloads: Equilibrium Point Estimation via Real-to-Sim Adaptation cites or references BeyondMimic: From Motion Tracking to Versatile Humanoid Control via Guided Diffusion.

Toward Control of Wheeled Humanoid Robots with Unknown Payloads: Equilibrium Point Estimation via Real-to-Sim Adaptation cites or references DemoHLM: From One Demonstration to Generalizable Humanoid Loco-Manipulation.

Toward Control of Wheeled Humanoid Robots with Unknown Payloads: Equilibrium Point Estimation via Real-to-Sim Adaptation cites or references From Language to Locomotion: Retargeting-free Humanoid Control via Motion Latent Guidance.

Toward Control of Wheeled Humanoid Robots with Unknown Payloads: Equilibrium Point Estimation via Real-to-Sim Adaptation cites or references Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting.
